content.claim: Poland funds special educational needs support through per-pupil disability weightings ranging from 1.4 for mild intellectual disability to 9.5 for profound intellectual disability, with autism diagnoses unlocking subsidies up to approximately 9,500 zł compared to 1,400 zł for mild disability
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Figures are historical and may not reflect 2025 algorithm changes
Does not separately account for regional variation in funding or diagnostic thresholds
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
